functions.title: Guide Book #69
functions.author: Forsaken Odyssey
pages:
§7Guide Book #69§r
§lCrystalmite§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lVariants§r: 3
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lBehavior§r: Hostile
•§lMob type§r: Small arthropod, Earth-elemental, Monster.
•§lSpawns in§r: Crystal Cave
•§lHealth§r: 12

•§lWalk speed§r: 0.18
•§lImmune to§r: Fall Damage
•§lBreathes in§r: Air, Solid Blocks.
•§lPossible drops§r: Raw Arthropod Meat, Amethyst Shard, Quartz Shard, Rose Quartz Shard, XP Orbs.
•§lMelee attack damage§r: 2-3

•They can climb blocks.
•They submerged their bodies while idling.

§lDescription§r:
 
§‘Crystalmite is a small, hostile arthropod found in the glittering depths of Crystal Caves. With three shimmering variants, it scuttles slowly across walls and terrain, capable of climbing and submerging itself when idle.
Though fragile, its sharp crystalline body deals light damage, and defeating one may yield shards of amethyst, quartz, or rose quartz, making it a minor yet valuable threat beneath the surface.§’
